interface.longDescription:
🎬 Flixor: A Smarter Way to Choose What to Watch
With endless streaming options, deciding what to watch can be overwhelming. Flixor uses advanced AI to make finding the right movie or TV show fast, accurate, and effortlessly personalized. Just express a thought or a vague preference, and Flixor understands the story you need right now.
✨ Personalized Recommendations That Truly Fit
Flixor goes beyond simple genre filters. Our AI analyzes your tastes and contextual cues to deliver suggestions that match your exact viewing goals:
Mood: Finding content based on how you feel—light and fun, warm and comforting, or thrilling.
Vibe: Matching themes and styles, such as "90s nostalgia" or "visually stunning."
Context: Recommendations that fit the moment—"something to watch with friends" or "a quick documentary."
Stop scrolling endlessly. The right choices appear after a simple expression.
🎯 Smart Search & Effortless Discovery
Whether you take the lead or let Flixor guide you, discovery is seamless:
Flexible Search: Type a title, actor, or genre, or simply ask for "something good to watch."
Comprehensive Library: Explore Movies, TV Shows, Animation, Documentaries, and Variety—all in one place.
Learn Your Taste: The AI quietly adapts to what you enjoy, improving suggestions every time you use it.
🚀 More Watching, Less Searching. 
Download Flixor and let the story that fits you be easy to find.


How to Use in ChatGPT
1. Connect: Connect Flixor to ChatGPT.
2. Trigger: Activate the app using one of these methods:
Type Commands: Simply type “@” then choose Flixor, or type “Flixor” in the chat box.
